headline: Woman's 'Soft Launch' Was So Soft Nobody Realized She Was Dating Her Ex's Best Friend
summary: She posted 47 photos of 'him' with his face cropped out. Her ex saw the haircut. He knew. The drama is immense.
fullBody: Jessica Softlaunch posted 47 photos of her 'mysterious new man' with his face strategically cropped. Her ex recognized the haircut. 'That's my best friend's haircut,' he said. The internet exploded. #HaircutGate is trending. Jessica has gone private. Her ex has posted a story with the caption 'lol.' Her new man has also gone private. The haircut is now famous. No one knows who the man is. The haircut knows.
